dict.string: Set to List of KM Variable Prefixes that You do NOT Want to Delete
ENV_ DND_ kmfam Local Instance msResourcesPath DashLang

CONFIRM That you Want to DELETE ALL KM VARIABLES that do NOT start with one of these Prefixes:
%Variable%Local__DoNotDeletePrefix%
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ‼️WARNING! You Can NOT UNDO This Deletion. ⚠️Proceed with caution. ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Press/Click "Continue" to DELETE These Variables.
REPLACE: New Line with Pipe | for Use in RegEx Below
FOR EA: Variable in KM Variable Collection
IF: Variable Name Does NOT Start With Prefix; THEN DELETE

Number of KM Vars Deleted: %Variable%Local__NumDeleted% ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Do NOT Delete Prefix: %Variable%Local__DoNotDeletePrefix%
VARIABLES DELETED %Variable%Local__VarsDeleted% ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
